title: CV2 Specifications
description:
CV2 Specifications

CV2 Specifications

CV2-L/S/H/SA/HA

Item	Specification

Number of cameras	4
		 GigE cameras (Only Epson-designated cameras and cables can be
		 used.)

2 USB cameras (Only Epson-designatedcameras
		 and cables can be used.)

Power Source Voltage	19
		 to 24 VDC

Rated Electric Current	11.57
		 A (at 19V DC) to 9.16 A(at 24 VDC)

Rated Ambient Temperature	5
		 to 40 deg. C

Rated Relative Humidity	20
		 to 80% (with no condensation)

Mass	2.1
		 kg

Safety Standard	CE
		 Marking

  EMC Directive, RoHS Directive

KC Marking

CV2-LB/SB/HB

Item	Specification

Number of cameras	4
		 GigE cameras

(Only Epson-designated cameras and cables
		 can be used.)

2 USB cameras

(Only Epson-designated cameras and cables
		 can be used.)

Power Source Voltage	19
		 to 24 VDC

Rated Electric Current	8
		 A (at 19V DC) to 6.3 A(at 24 VDC)

Rated Ambient Temperature	5
		 to 40 deg. C

Rated Relative Humidity	20
		 to 80% (with no condensation)

Mass	2.1
		 kg

CV2 supports the following GigE cameras and USB cameras.

For detailed specifications of each camera, refer to Camera.

Model	Resolution
		 (color, monochrome)

Standard GigE camera	640
		 x 480 (monochrome)

Standard 2 GigE camera	640
		 x 480 (monochrome)

1.3 mega-pixel GigE camera	1280
		 x 1024 (monochrome)

2 mega-pixel 2 GigE camera	1600
		 x 1200 (monochrome)

2 mega-pixel 2 GigE color camera	1600
		 x 1200 (color)

2 mega-pixel GigE camera	1600
		 x 1200 (monochrome)

2 mega-pixel GigE color camera	1600
		 x 1200 (color)

5 mega-pixel GigE camera	2560
		 x 1920 (monochrome)

5 mega-pixel GigE color camera	2560
		 x 1920 (color)

5 mega-pixel 2 GigE camera*	2560
		 x 1920 (monochrome)

5 mega-pixel 2 GigE color camera*	2560
		 x 1920 (color)

10 mega-pixel GigE camera*	3664
		 x 2748 (monochrome)

10 mega-pixel GigE color camera *	3664
		 x 2748 (color)

20 mega-pixel GigE camera*	5472
		 x 3648 (monochrome)

20 mega-pixel GigE color camera *	5472
		 x 3648 (color)

*: This is not available for CV2-L.

Model	Resolution
		 (color, monochrome)

Standard USB camera	640
		 x 480 (monochrome)

1.3 mega-pixel USB camera	1280
		 x 1024 (monochrome)

1.3 mega-pixel USB color camera	1280
		 x 1024 (color)

5 mega-pixel USB camera	2560
		 x 1920 (monochrome)

5 mega-pixel USB color camera	2560
		 x 1920 (color)
